title: A Child Lost in the Storm
description: Reproduction of Eduardo Galeano's personal essay, excerpted from El Pais (March 28, 1990), translated into English by Marilyn Buck while she was imprisoned. From the Freedom Archives' Marilyn Buck literary file in the White Anti-Imperialist Prisoners collection.

title: Boston Trial Convicts 3 Irish Activists: Join the Campaign to Overturn the Convictions!
description: Constitutional Defense Fund pamphlet on the 1990 Boston convictions of three Irish republican activists. From the Freedom Archives' Irish Prisoners subcollection inside the White Anti-Imperialist Prisoners collection.

title: Who Is Chuck Malone (And Why Is He in Jail?)
description: Malone Defense Fund monograph profiling Chuck Malone, one of the three Irish republican activists convicted in the 1990 Boston Trial. From the Freedom Archives' Irish Prisoners subcollection inside the White Anti-Imperialist Prisoners collection.

title: David Gilbert — A Lifetime of Struggle
description: Behind-prison-walls discussion with David Gilbert — lifelong anti-imperialist activist and former Weather Underground member then serving a life sentence for his role in the 1981 Brink's robbery in support of the Black Liberation Movement.

title: Marilyn Buck — A Tribute (Video Clip)
description: Marilyn Buck talks about how she came into her own as a revolutionary and her experience in the anti-Vietnam and Black Liberation movements.
